HOW IT WORKS

Getting Your Device Fixed is Simple

(01): Contact Us

Reach out via WhatsApp or call. Tell us your device fault, company name, and Lagos location - we will schedule an on-site visit.

(02): Diagnosis

We assess your device and provide a transparent repair quote.

(03): Repair

Our technicians get to work with genuine parts and expert skill.

(04): Quality Check

We test thoroughly before returning your device, fully functional.

SAFETY IS HERE

We Fix It All

Privacy-First Repair

We understand that every business PC and device contains sensitive information. Our technicians follow strict confidentiality practices and repair without tampering with your data.

MacBook & Laptop

Advanced chip-level repairs, screen replacements, and thermal optimization for all portable workstations.

PC & Desktop

Performance tuning, hardware upgrades, and enterprise server maintenance for high-uptime environments. 

Smartphone

Precision repairs for flagship devices. Screen, battery, and water damage restoration using OEM parts. 

Corporate Support

On-site infrastructure support and device fleet management for fintechs, startups, and SMEs. We come to your office - you never leave your desk.

At myComputerENGR, we maintain a flawless standard of technical delivery. Our numbers prove our commitment to keeping your enterprise workstation operating at 100% capacity with zero hidden overheads.

Learn About US

myComputerENGR is the dedicated B2B device repair company. We exist for one purpose: keeping business teams operational. Since 2012, we have maintained and repaired over 12,000 devices for entrepreneurs, SMEs, startups, and corporate organisations across Nigeria - always on-site, always transparent, always data-safe.

Read Our Full Story

SERVICES

What We Do

Your trusted partner for all Computer software and hardware needs – reliable, skilled, and timely solutions you can count on.

Hardware Repair

Expert repair of motherboards, power supplies, and other critical components.

  • Motherboard repair

  • Power supply issues

  • Fan & cooling solutions

  • Component diagnostics

Read More

Component Supply

Quality computer parts and components with warranty guarantees.

  • CPUs & Memory

  • Storage solutions

  • Peripherals

  • Cooling system

Read More

Data Recovery

Professional data recovery from damaged or failed storage devices.

  • HDD recovery

  • SSD repair

  • Data backup solutions

  • Drive diagnostics

Read More

System Optimization

Improve performance with cleaning, updates, and system tuning.

  • Software updates

  • Malware removal

  • System cleaning

  • Performance tuning

Read More

Display Solutions

Screen repair, replacement, and troubleshooting services.

  • Screen replacement

  • LCD repair

  • Cable fixes

  • Port repairs

Read More

Security & Setup

Install security software and configure your system safely.

  • Antivirus setup

  • Firewall configuration

  • Backup solutions

  • Security consultation

Read More

Why Choose myComputerENGR

We're committed to delivering exceptional service and quality solutions for all your computer needs.

Authorised Apple Tech

Certified to service all Apple devices with genuine parts.

On-Site Repair

We come to your office or home – no need to travel.

Fast Turnaround

Most repairs completed same-day or next-day.

Transparent Pricing

Clear quotes before any work begins. No hidden charges, ever.
